findings.title: Live git merge conflict in ROADMAP.md footer — conflict markers committed to working tree
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md contained unresolved git conflict markers (<<<<<<< HEAD / ======= / >>>>>>> 3e502df) in the footer section. The file was in a corrupted state that would render broken on GitHub and block any worker reading ROADMAP.
findings.fix_sketch: Resolve by keeping the 2026-06-17 (HEAD) version, removing both marker blocks and the duplicate 3e502df footer.

findings.title: ADR-0011 missing required MADR sections: Decision Drivers, Considered Options, Consequences, Confirmation
findings.detail: docs/decisions/0011-retell-voice-platform-erratum.md has status: accepted but is structurally incomplete — it omits Decision Drivers, Considered Options, Consequences, and Confirmation sections required by MADR format (ADR-0008). The pre-commit hook blocks editing status:accepted files, so this cannot be fixed autonomously.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian must either: (a) change status to 'proposed', add required sections, re-accept; or (b) open ADR-0012 that formally completes the rationale, superseding 0011. Pre-commit hook must be bypassed manually.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B has not been created — coordination repo has no active sprint for 32 days
findings.detail: Every factory spec file references SPRINT-2026-05-B as pending since 2026-05-21. As of 2026-06-21 (day 32 overdue), no sprint document exists. Workers have no work queue; all four Q2 OKRs are MISSED. Blocking M-002 through M-015.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian + Esme must open SPRINT-2026-05-B with realistic capacity, adjusted OKRs for Q3, and explicit Retell R1 task. This is a human decision — cannot be autonomously resolved.

findings.title: ROADMAP M-005 adrs field references ADR-0006 but ADR-0006 is superseded by ADR-0011
findings.detail: M-005 listed adrs: [ADR-0006] but ADR-0006 was superseded by ADR-0011 on 2026-06-04. Workers looking up the ADR for M-005 would find a deprecated decision.
findings.fix_sketch: Update M-005 adrs field from [ADR-0006] to [ADR-0011].

findings.title: ROADMAP Q3 blocking note says '28 days elapsed' for Retell R1 overdue — actually 32+ days
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Open Questions Q3 blocking note was last updated 2026-06-17 (28 days since 2026-05-20 sprint end). As of 2026-06-21 it is 32+ days elapsed. Stale count misleads operators about urgency.
findings.fix_sketch: Update elapsed days to 32+, update date reference to 2026-06-21, add STATUS.md pointer.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Next' section heading references expired delivery window '2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04' with zero delivery
findings.detail: The ## Next section heading contained a parenthetical '(next cycle — 2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04; window expired with zero delivery; re-plan pending)' — that window expired 17 days ago. The verbose expired-window text is misleading; the critical fact is that SPRINT-B is not yet open.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace parenthetical with '(re-plan pending — SPRINT-2026-05-B not yet opened)' for clarity without the stale date range.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Later' section heading says '2026-Q2 / Q3' — Q2 ended 2026-06-30 (2026-06-21: Q2 not yet ended but nearly)
findings.detail: The ## Later section heading says 'this quarter — 2026-Q2 / Q3'. Q2 ends 2026-06-30 (9 days away). These milestones (M-020 through M-024) are genuinely Q3+ deliverables and should not be labeled Q2.
findings.fix_sketch: Update heading to '## Later (2026-Q3 and beyond)' to reflect actual timeline.

findings.title: README.md spec-template row shows 'Not yet created' — repo has existed since 2026-05-16
findings.detail: The README repo-status table showed spec-template as 'Not yet created'. The spec-template repo was created on 2026-05-16 (gh repo view weautomatehq1/spec-template confirms isTemplate: true). ROADMAP M-001 was already flipped to shipped.
findings.fix_sketch: Update spec-template row to reflect actual status: exists as template repo created 2026-05-16.

findings.title: KPI.md KR2 day count says '11 days past deadline' — actually 14 days (deadline was 2026-06-07, today 2026-06-21)
findings.detail: KPI.md KR2 row and its notes referenced '11 days past deadline' and 'passed 11 days ago'. The KR2 deadline was 2026-05-27; as of 2026-06-21 it is 25 days past deadline (or the dates may reference a different KR2 deadline). The count needs updating to match the current date.
findings.fix_sketch: Update KR2 day counts to reflect current elapsed days as of 2026-06-21.

findings.title: ARCHITECTURE.md cross-cutting concerns table lists wrong owner for Logging and Error Handling
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md cross-cutting concerns table listed 'AGENTS.md §6' as owner for both Logging standard and Error handling standard. AGENTS.md §6 is 'Code standards (delta from defaults)' and says 'This repo has no code'. The actual logging/error standards are defined in ARCHITECTURE.md §6 (this section). Self-referential owner was confused with a cross-file reference.
findings.fix_sketch: Change owner for Logging and Error Handling from 'AGENTS.md §6' to 'ARCHITECTURE.md §6 (this section)'.

findings.title: No Q3 2026 OKRs defined — Q3 starts 2026-07-01 (10 days away) with zero goals
findings.detail: All four Q2 2026 OKRs are MISSED. KPI.md has no Q3 OKR section. Q3 starts in 10 days. Without OKRs, workers have no success criteria and cannot self-assess impact of decisions.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian must define Q3 2026 OKRs before 2026-07-01. Suggest tying them to SPRINT-B deliverables: voice-discovery repo live, at least one real client interview. Cannot be autonomously resolved.

findings.title: RISKS.md risk rows have not been re-scored in 30-37 days — staleness exceeds the quarterly review cadence
findings.detail: RISKS.md last_updated is 2026-06-13 but individual risk row assessments (probability, impact, FMEA scores) were last substantively reviewed at repo scaffold (2026-05-15). Risks R-001 through R-015 have never been re-scored against post-sprint reality. The sprint failure (SPRINT-2026-05-A incomplete) materially changes probability/impact for several risks.
findings.fix_sketch: Sebastian or Esme must review RISKS.md row by row with sprint-failure context. At minimum: R-003 (delivery delay) should be escalated to HIGH. Cannot be autonomously scored without judgment.

findings.title: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md IFleet entry references Mac local path ~/dev/IFleet — conflicts with VPS path /home/user/IFleet
findings.detail: UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md IFleet entry and potentially other references use Mac-local path convention (~/dev/ai-products/IFleet or ~/dev/IFleet). The nightly audit and active runtime run on a Hostinger VPS where IFleet is at /home/user/IFleet. Path inconsistency can cause worker confusion when generating runbook commands or cross-repo references.
findings.fix_sketch: Clarify canonical path per environment: Mac dev = ~/dev/IFleet, VPS = /home/user/IFleet. Add environment note. Requires Sebastian to confirm Mac path convention before editing.

findings.title: SECURITY.md 'Protected Paths (the auto-merge gate)' heading generates wrong GitHub anchor
findings.detail: The section heading '## Protected Paths (the auto-merge gate)' generates anchor #protected-paths-the-auto-merge-gate. Cross-references in other files using #protected-paths resolve to nothing on GitHub. Standard heading should be '## Protected Paths'.
findings.fix_sketch: Change heading to '## Protected Paths'. Move 'the auto-merge gate' context to the first paragraph under the heading.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §3 repo tree shows ADR range '0001-*.md … 0010-*.md' — ADR-0011 now exists
findings.detail: The AGENTS.md directory tree shows the ADR range as '0001-*.md … 0010-*.md'. ADR-0011 was created 2026-06-04. The tree is one ADR behind.
findings.fix_sketch: Update ADR range to '0001-*.md … 0011-*.md'.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §3 repo tree missing docs/postmortems/ and docs/templates/ directories
findings.detail: AGENTS.md §3 directory tree only shows docs/decisions/. Per RUNBOOK.md and FILE_STRUCTURE.md, docs/postmortems/ and docs/templates/ are also part of the factory repo structure but are absent from the tree.
findings.fix_sketch: Add docs/postmortems/ and docs/templates/ entries to the repo tree under docs/.

findings.title: NON_GOALS.md NoGo-6 references 'M-026+, not this product line' — M-026+ does not exist (current max is M-024)
findings.detail: NoGo-6 text said 'beyond the current roadmap horizon (M-026+, not this product line)'. ROADMAP.md only defines milestones up to M-024. M-026+ is a phantom reference.
findings.fix_sketch: Update M-026+ to M-024+ to match the actual roadmap horizon.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md initial scaffold entry says '14 third-party services' — correct count is 13
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md Added section says 'INTEGRATIONS.md — 13 third-party services + 4 internal tools registered (corrected from 14; see [Unreleased] 2026-06-07)' in the Unreleased section but the original Added entry still says '14 third-party services'. Inconsistency confuses readers scanning the historical record.
findings.fix_sketch: Update the Added entry from '14 third-party services' to '13 third-party services + 4 internal tools' for consistency with the correction note above it.

findings.title: STATUS.md overdue day counts (28/29 days) are 3-4 days stale as of 2026-06-21
findings.detail: STATUS.md In-flight and Up-next sections referenced 28-29 days overdue, last updated 2026-06-18. As of 2026-06-21 the correct count is 32 days overdue.
findings.fix_sketch: Update all overdue day counts to 32 and refresh the last-updated footer.

findings.title: ADR-0006 Erratum section lacks explicit pointer to ADR-0011 which supersedes this decision
findings.detail: docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md Erratum section (added 2026-05-30) explains the NG-something placeholder but does not note that the ADR itself was superseded by ADR-0011 (created 2026-06-04). A reader scanning ADR-0006's erratum could miss the supersession.
findings.fix_sketch: Append a note to the Erratum section pointing to ADR-0011 as the superseder.
